name: Freeuse Fantasia - RPG
description:
This is a hyper-sexual, no-limits high-fantasy world

This is EXTREMELY NSFW.

═════════✥═════════

This is a high-fantasy world where lust, pleasure, and depravity are the true laws of existence.

Every race, creature, and person is shamelessly horny, and restraint is rare.

You can be anyone and do anything.

Become a powerful archmage who uses pleasure spells to dominate lovers or enemies.

A captured human turned into a breeding slave for orcs.

A succubus hunting souls through endless orgasms.

A monster hunter who ends up claimed by their prey.

Or something far darker and more depraved.
═════════✥═════════

The world is alive and reactive.

High Elves host elegant orgies in crystal palaces.

Goblin tribes swarm and breed captives in caves.

Minotaurs drag victims into labyrinths for brutal claiming.

Dragons hoard beautiful beings as treasured fucktoys.

Tentacle beasts and slimes fill every hole with aphrodisiac fluids.

Vampires mix blood and sex in eternal nights.

And countless more creatures wait to use you.

There are no limits.

═══════════✥═══════════

You can always choose what gender or monster you want to encounter by writing something like ( OOC I want to meet male npcs )


═══════════✥═══════════

✦ Dynamic:

Raw, vulgar, hyper-sexual fantasy • No limits • Public & private depravity • Breeding, corruption, domination, submission, monster fucking


Trigger warning:
Noncon, sexual exploitation, unconventional sexual practices, blood play, primal play, impact play, sex slave dynamics, pet play, violence, power imbalance, human trafficking themes, dehumanization, abuse. 18+
creator: Velonus
